The workload can be demanding, but it provides excellent preparation for a professional career in the transport and mobility sector.

name: Sapienza University of Rome
text: Studying the MSc in Transport Systems Engineering at Sapienza University of Rome has been a very rewarding experience. The program is well structured and covers key topics such as transport planning, traffic engineering, railway systems, and intelligent transportation systems. The courses are challenging and require a solid background in mathematics and engineering, but the professors are knowledgeable and supportive.

name: Sapienza University of Rome
text: I am currently doing my masters degree and its been great in the first year looking forward to the second year. Professors are really nice classes are interactive! The campus is beautiful overall really nice opportunity for students to experience and grow

name: Sapienza University of Rome
text: I personally think that this is a truly great university and i really like the quantity of bachelor’s degrees, the lessons have most of the time great professors and usually the lessons are placed in the right time of the day

name: Sapienza University of Rome
text: At Sapienza University of Rome, the Green Industrial Engineering for Sustainable Development MSc feels like learning to redesign the world—one system at a time. It’s not just lectures; it’s a constant push to rethink how industries should work, not just how they do.

name: Sapienza University of Rome
text: I would to ask more information a. about student life and How teachers and professors support students to join in lab or internship?

name: Università degli Studi di Milano
text: I would recommend this university because it allowed me to complete several internships over the years, which allowed me to explore a variety of career opportunities. Another positive aspect is the limited number of students. Since there were only 50 of us, the professors were able to provide constant and personal support. The negative aspect is that my degree program wasn’t held in a separate campus within the university, and I wasn’t able to fully enjoy the experience (my program was held on the upper floor of a healthcare facility).

name: Università degli Studi di Milano
text: We have highly competent professors and offer an incredibly wide range of courses, though the university struggles with a severe lack of funds. Fortunately, the students come from diverse backgrounds and are generally chill, laid-back people.

name: Università degli Studi di Milano
text: My Bachelor’s experience at University of Milan was academically enriching and personally transformative. The program gave me a strong foundation in my field while helping me develop critical thinking, research, and time-management skills. Studying in a diverse and international environment also broadened my perspective.

name: Università degli Studi di Milano
text: The curriculum I followed was great, it had great depth and the professors were always prepared and available to students. The structure, the administrator and the organisation could be largely include. There is a lack of spaces, lessons’ schedules were a nightmare for commuting students and the administrative processes required ages to be done.

name: Università degli Studi di Milano
text: Studying at the University of Milan has been a challenging yet rewarding experience for me. As a student, I’ve found the academic environment to be both stimulating and demanding. The professors are generally very knowledgeable and passionate about their subjects, which makes lectures engaging, especially when they connect theory to real-world applications. However, the teaching style can sometimes feel quite traditional, with a strong focus on lectures rather than interactive learning.

name: University of Turin
text: I studied at the University of Turin a few years ago and overall I had a positive experience. The university offers a wide range of courses and has a long academic tradition. Some administrative procedures could be slow at times, but the professors were generally knowledgeable and supportive. Looking back, I’m glad I chose UniTo and I would recommend it to anyone considering studying in Italy.

name: University of Turin
text: I completed both my Bachelor’s and Master’s degrees in Languages at the University of Turin. Overall, my experience was very positive. The programme offered a strong combination of language learning, translation, linguistics, literature, and intercultural communication. I appreciated the opportunity to study different languages and develop both academic and practical skills.

name: University of Turin
text: It’s definitely recommended if you are coming to Italy from abroad, but considere carefully your options. The buildings are all across the city so the position really depends on the courses’ choice. What’s really important is that it’s a really populous university and city, you can get plenty of help from peers, definitely not from the university, and many libraries to study in or to take textbooks from.

name: University of Turin
text: I am currently study at the Einaudi Campus,so the facilities and the campus in general are great. The professors are also great and tries to stay on point with their students. Overall is a good college with a good infrastrutture and a great academic society.

name: University of Turin
text: My experience as an international student at the Agricultural and Veterinary campus has been mixed. The university has good infrastructure, but it is clearly disorganized and not well prepared to receive students from other countries.

name: Erasmus University Rotterdam
text: The campus is modern and international, so it’s easy to meet students from different countries. However, because of the size of the university, it can sometimes feel a bit impersonal and you need to make an effort to connect with others.

name: Erasmus University Rotterdam
text: I love the international atmosphere at this university and the overall vibe, the lecturers and the programme is very professional, although food options and prices can be improved.

name: Erasmus University Rotterdam
text: Very internationally orientated.Central location in the bustling modern metropole of Rotterdam.Very accessible.Campuslife was vibrant,classes with flexibele hours good for working students Professors generally speaking easy going and good in motivating and helping out.In general a pleasant experience.

name: Erasmus University Rotterdam
text: I would recommende the Erasmus University for it’s multi cultural aspect.This leads to broading your contacts on an international scale and to mpotentially interesting invitations.The city,Rotterdam in itself is dynamc and fast paced,no boring moments there.There is a great variety if coures,some of which hardly anywhere ese to be found.The study programs ar solid and do respect the individual.The contact between students is easy ,the camous is contact friendly and there are many meeting ponts.

name: Erasmus University Rotterdam
text: Studying at Erasmus University was a valuable experience. I really liked the international environment—students from all over the world made discussions diverse and engaging. The professors are very knowledgeable, and the courses are structured in a way that connects theory with practical applications.

name: Leiden University
text: I think Leiden University is one of the top rated in the world. Especially for the Advanced Master’s program I took. There are top teachers, top quality learning, and many campuses. It was lovely to be a student there, as classmates were very friendly, and everyone was open to deep discussion and learning.

name: Leiden University
text: One of the most fond memories of Leiden University I have is the part of the campus I attended (Humanities, Archaeology). The university buildings for humanities are all located in and near the old and cosy city center making it a very fun location to study and attend classes in. The courses, professors and materials are of course all of modern quality but especially for Archaeology being able to attend the classes in matching historical buildings makes for an, in my opinion, fantastic experience.

name: Leiden University
text: Leiden University has a very plaesant and organised structure regarding their communication towards new students. The institution excels in accompanying students and makes their experience feel organised and not chaotic as a lot of students fear.

name: Leiden University
text: Leiden university is a really nice place to pursue your masters degree. I liked the international/multicultural context and the aesthetics of the buildings. My studies there added to my knowledge of children and adolescent psychology and my experience with foreign universities and new learning approaches.

name: Leiden University
text: Leiden University gives you the complete package for success – hands-on skills, deep knowledge, and real-world preparation. What makes it special? Passionate professors who don’t just teach but mentor you to your full potential. Through its research-powered courses and practical approach, Leiden turns students into professionals ready to make an impact from day one.

name: Radboud University
text: The university is located in Nijmegen, a city in the eastern part of the Netherlands. I experienced both social science and business administration departments in the university. I met great and supportive people with inclusive mindset in both departments. I recommend studying and working there.

name: Radboud University
text: In my opinion this is the best choice I made in terms of my career. Ive met a lot of great people and made so many new friends, the facilities at this school are also really great, the classes are most of the time really great.

name: Radboud University
text: Radboud is an amazing uni, with plenty of beautiful building and great and approachable teachers. I am currently in the second year of my bachelor, and I’ve learned so much already and made so many new friends! Some buildings are a bit old (like Spinoza, Linnaeus and Erasmus), but the newer buildings like MM and Grotius are very pretty. The food everywhere is also great.

name: Radboud University
text: What stood out to me were the wide range of courses you could choose from, and the range of experiences that professors brought with them. The course is highly customisable, and can be tailored to interests or future career paths. Additionally, the programme simulates to study abroad, which underlines the international mindset you are taught

name: Radboud University
text: I really liked the scale of my programme, there were very few students and the teachers were able to spend a lot of time with us. The subjects were interesting. The buildings at the time were not of high quality, quite old-fashioned, but I have never missed the technology and I have always felt quite welcome on campus.

name: University of Groningen
text: I did both my BA and MA here, and did like it overall. The Master’s was not as structured as I’d like it to be, mostly due to the change of that year specifically (with professors retiring and new ones coming in from outside), but there was a lot of attention to all students and their preferences within the field. On top of that, most students were not able to finish the MA in time due to improper time management of the teachers (again due to the changes in the curriculum), but I’ve heard it was resolved the year after I graduated.

name: University of Groningen
text: Great university with high quality education. Great student life and nice city however the wheather throughout the year could be better. The education is of high niveau.

name: University of Groningen
text: I have studies Masters in Chemistry from University of Groningen. It was a great experience overall. I had outstanding learning opportunities. Its very well oriented and the study material which was provided is also up-to-date.

name: University of Groningen
text: I do not have a lot to compare to because this is my first time going to uni, but everything seems fair; lecture are well structured, tutorials are nicely organized by higher year students and overall not a bad school.

name: University of Groningen
text: The economics programme has a good mix between theory and empirics. It also has a good mathematical focus and is therefore more quantitative than most. The workload may be a bit higher, but that is only when the goal is to become more prestiguous. Now, I think it aligns with the incusivity goals of the university.

name: University of Groningen
text: How is the study experience in the Data Science and Society program at the University of Groningen? How would you evaluate its future prospects?

name: Delft University of Technology
text: The university offers great learning material as well as lectures. The bachelor study program Aerospace Engineering is a rocky road and you have to get used to the pace, but it will all be fine if you study well. The program offers advanced topics on aviation and space, as well a lot of mathematics and physics. The program also includes a project where you will do group work and will switch groups every semester.

name: Delft University of Technology
text: I studied architecture at Delft University of Technology from 2006 to 2008. The program offered a strong technical foundation in modern design, with a clear focus on construction methods, detailing, and large-scale project development. Studio work was rigorous, and the expectations around technical precision were high.

name: Delft University of Technology
text: I have a positive attitude towards my University. I am pursuing my PhD which is considered as a job rather than being a student. There are several reasons for that, those are described as follows; 1. Multicultural 2. Work-life balance 3. Good PI (lab centric) 4. Accessibility

name: Delft University of Technology
text: Mechanical Engineering at TU Delft is a broad programme with lots of different subjects. The facilities and campus of TU Delft are nice. Teachers and professors are excellent. Only downside is the lack of personal guidance, because the huge amount of mechanical engineering students.

name: Delft University of Technology
text: I like how TU Delft is one of the few places where the focus is on Engineering. The campus brings some down sides like the wind and the course contents can be somewhat difficult and more stressful because of the mathematics. But that is why I think TU Delft in the Netherlands is so charming.

name: Eindhoven University of Technology
text: At Eindhoven University of Technology, the MSc in Electrical Engineering feels like learning to think in signals, systems, and possibilities. It’s not just about circuits—it’s about how technology quietly powers everything around us.

name: Eindhoven University of Technology
text: The Eindhoven University of Technology stands out for its strong focus on engineering, innovation, and real-world problem-solving. The courses are designed to combine theory with practical applications, which makes learning more engaging and useful for future careers.

name: Eindhoven University of Technology
text: My time at Eindhoven University of Technology has been absolutely brilliant! The lecturers really know their stuff and are always ready to help you out. The campus is stunning and there’s always something happening; events, clubs, you name it. Everyone is so friendly, and I’ve made some proper good friends here. The courses are well put together, the teaching is engaging because the lecturers genuinely love what they do, and support is never far away. Honestly, it’s been fantastic and I’d recommend to anyone looking for a great uni experience.

name: Eindhoven University of Technology
text: It’s a very nice university, since my programme is on the small side you get lots of personal help and attention. The professors are often very skilled in their subjects and are very enthusiastic to teach you more about them.

name: Eindhoven University of Technology
text: My experience at Eindhoven University of Technology has been fantastic so far! The academic environment’s supportive, and the lecturers are really dedicated. I’ve appreciated the focus on personal development and the close-knit community, which makes learning more engaging. The small class sizes have allowed me to build strong connections with my teachers and fellow students. I’m grateful for the education and connections I’ve gained, which will provide a solid foundation for my future.

name: Maastricht University
text: The university is relativety small yet feels like an open international environment. Is located next to the hospital, convenient for (bio)medical programmes. Nice newly renovated library. Enough facilities.

name: Maastricht University
text: Studying at this university has been a genuinely positive experience. The atmosphere on campus is warm and welcoming, which made it easy to settle in and feel part of the community. What really stood out to me was the supportive environment in the classroom: most professors are approachable and genuinely invested in helping students succeed.

name: Maastricht University
text: Academically, it’s a top-tier university with a great reputation. However, the PBL system can be hit or miss depending on your group’s motivation and the tutor. The workload is quite high and the pace is fast. The biggest downside is the housing crisis in Maastricht. Finding a room is extremely difficult and expensive, so you need to start looking months in advance. Overall, it’s a challenging but valuable experience.

name: Maastricht University
text: I really like how the faculties are connected to each other. Our faculty contains three connected buildings. The professors here have years of teaching experience and they love to tell about their field of study.

name: Maastricht University
text: Excellent guidance is provided here, with a curriculum that has been thoughtfully created to get students ready for both future employment and real-world opportunities. The teachers are very committed and always take the time to make sure the students fully grasp the material. The campus is vibrant, secure, and teeming with events that enhance the student experience. Classrooms, libraries, labs, and sports fields are among the well-equipped and frequently maintained facilities. The setting encourages students to strike a balance between their studies and personal growth.

name: Utrecht University
text: This university has some of the best teachers ive had in my academic career, caring and helpfull if you ask them, the classes can sometimes be hard and sceduals all over the place depending on what you study, but all around a good university with friendly students and helpfull teachers

name: Utrecht University
text: Utrecht University proves that a clean campus is synonymous with a clear mind. Between the immaculate facilities and a student body that genuinely takes pride in keeping things tidy, the atmosphere is incredibly refreshing. It’s not just about the maintenance staff; there’s a real culture of respect here that makes studying on campus a much better experience.

name: Utrecht University
text: Professors at UU are known for interactive seminars. Unlike many big schools, they actually want to hear your opinion. They carry a quiet confidence—less “lecturer” and more “mentor.” The 1:10 staff-to-student ratio means you actually get noticed in the classroom.

name: Utrecht University
text: Utrecht Uni actually cares about keeping things clean – and it shows! From spotless study spaces to tidy campus grounds, the good vibes help you focus way better. What’s cool is that students here actually respect the environment too – no trash left around, everyone does their part. It’s not just about rules; they’ve created a culture where being considerate comes naturally. Honestly makes studying here 10x more pleasant.

name: Utrecht University
text: Honestly, my uni is the kind of place where no matter who you are or where you’re from, you just fit right in. Everyone gets the same shot at success, and I’ve never seen anyone treated unfairly. The best part? You’re constantly learning from people with totally different life experiences—in class, at events, even just hanging out. There’s zero tolerance for prejudice, and it actually shows. It’s not just ‘diversity’ on paper; people genuinely respect each other. Feels like the real world *should* work, you know?

name: University of Amsterdam
text: It was an overall great experience at the university of amsterdam. The professors were very approachable and cordial. It was a great learning period. I also made a good number of friends there that we still communicate with.

name: University of Amsterdam
text: My overall experience at UvA was great. The program was well-structured, and the professors were generally approachable if you took the initiative to ask questions during or after lectures. The campus is well-integrated into the beautiful city of Amsterdam. I deducted one star because the schedule can sometimes feel a bit cramped, and the exams are heavily weighted. I would definitely recommend UvA to anyone looking for a high-quality European university experience.

name: University of Amsterdam
text: I was finished my Master degree during the covid time. Unfortunately we only have online courses and the only time I entered the campus was I went for pick up my diploma files…In general the professors and students support are kind and helpful.

name: University of Amsterdam
text: Amsterdam university has it all, from good staff to good lectures to good people, I’m really surprised and disappointed at the same time if it makes sense, lol, I just hope I do really well in my degree pursuit.

name: University of Amsterdam
text: The pre-masters program at the UvA is very accessible and it gives you access to the Master’s program after completion in case you don’t manage to fit the education requirements for the master’s. The block system the University has, really helps to reduce the study load as you only take 1 or 2 courses per block (in case of the pre-master’s) leaving you a lot of free time to study and work if needed. UvA offers a lot of facilities for students. Overall a great University and program.

name: Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam
text: I completed the Master’s in Human Movement Sciences at Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam and overall had a positive experience. The program offers a good balance between theory and practical application, especially through group projects and research assignments. Most lecturers are knowledgeable and approachable, which made it easy to ask questions.

name: Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam
text: My experience studying Artificial Intelligence at Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam has been intense, challenging, and formative in a way I did not fully expect when I started. The programme is strongly theory-driven and becomes progressively more demanding, especially once you move beyond the introductory courses into machine learning, probability, optimization, and algorithms. This is not a programme where you can coast by memorising slides. You are constantly expected to understand why methods work, not just how to apply them.

name: Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam
text: My overall experience about the university has been quite positive. I am really impressed by the student life here. Specifically, I am quite amazed by the quality of education being offered here. I am doing my masters in International Technology Law and we have guest lectures from the experts in the industry which helps us in having a practical perspective apart from the theoretical knowledge alone.

name: Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam
text: Both the student community and faculty are very diverse and we get to put our skills into practice with different skills assessments like case studies and analysis of real-world solutions. The girst year is broad, think topics like global supply chains or marketing cross-borders with cultural sensitivity. Of course there is an international exchange in the final year and you get to spend some time abroad. Its very exciting!

name: Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam
text: Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam is renowned for its innovative and interdisciplinary approach to education. Its Bachelor’s program in Business Analytics stands out as a dynamic blend of business, data science, and technology. The program equips students with practical problem-solving skills, focusing on real-world applications of data analysis in decision-making processes. With a strong emphasis on collaboration and industry partnerships, it offers excellent career prospects in the fast-evolving field of analytics. The university’s vibrant international environment and central location in Amsterdam further enhance the student experience. A great choice for aspiring data-driven professionals!

name: Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam
text: Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam provides a remarkable educational experience, with a mix of theoretical and practical courses. It’s fantastic that you’ve been able to delve into your studies with a wide range of topics with everything from the cultural aspects of international business to technology to global economics. The instructors here are exceptional and have worked with international businesses.

name: Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam
text: This uni has an exceptional community with a wide range of student engagement opportunities and skills-building events and workshops that promote personal growth. The academic environment is both challenging and encouraging, offering programs that can advance your career by building on your current skills and experience.

name: Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam
text: In my opinion, this university excels in its educational system. The lecturers go above and beyond to help us succeed in our modules, offering support and understanding, though some maintain strict and disciplined standards.

name: Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam
text: I strongly recommend Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam to prospective learners as someone who recently graduated from this university. I had an excellent experience at Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam, and I am convinced that the institution gave me many opportunities for both personal and professional growth.

name: Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam
text: Artificial Intelligence, when I studied there in 2018, was a very small program. I really liked this aspect because of the one-on-one attention provided by the professors and the intimacy of the workgroups. After the first year of completing the program, the popularity of the study increased significantly, with the number of students rising from 80 to 300. This growth demonstrates the study’s popularity at VU, which is a result of the well-delivered curriculum by the University

name: University of Aveiro
text: I think the university is great overall. The atmosphere is amazing and it’s easy to meet people and feel part of the community. The courses have a good balance between theoretical and practical learning. The facilities are also very good, with well equipped labs, a large library and an online platform where teachers share materials for students to study. There are also many events that help new students feel welcome and stay engaged throughout the year. Some professors are very passionate about teaching and are always willing to help, while others are more average. One downside is that administrative services can be quite slow, especially when dealing with timetable issues, which can be frustrating.

name: University of Aveiro
text: I have a really good opinion about the University of Aveiro. The campus is huge, an open air architectural museum (most buildings were designed by renowned architects) and extremely beautiful surroundings. But that’s just one of the features. The fact that the campus is just one unique “space”, it allows students from different fields and degrees to interact with each other on a daily basis, broadening their horizons and ways of thinking. This also allows for a really close relationship with most of the teachers and staff.

name: University of Aveiro
text: Great unniversity, with a huge campus. Everyone is connected and that’s why it has a great community. The professores are open minded and try to help you as much as they can.

name: University of Aveiro
text: The University of Aveiro is one of the best universities in Portugal, with a strong reputation for research and several high-quality programs, especially in science and engineering. It offers great opportunities for those who enjoy research, innovation, and want to combine their studies with a calmer and more focused environment.

name: University of Aveiro
text: The University of Aveiro is, in my experience, a great place to study because it combines strong academic teaching with an environment that genuinely motivates students to grow. One of the things that makes it stand out is how practical and hands-on the learning is. Instead of focusing only on theory, most courses encourage us to apply what we learn through projects, labs, and real challenges, which makes the whole process much more engaging and useful

name: University of Beira Interior
text: Undervalued university. It has good facilities and is located in a very welcoming city. The academic environment is very good, and we felt at home. There is a lot of closeness between students and teachers. My experience at the university and in the city was very positive. I recommend it.

name: University of Beira Interior
text: I really enjoyed my experience at UBI; the faculty is excellent, very helpful, and concerned about the students. We managed to forge good relationships, and I’m sure we’ll maintain them. I learned a lot from this university and had excellent opportunities for my professional development. Furthermore, I had the opportunity to create good friendships and strengthen important skills.

name: University of Beira Interior
text: The teachers and staff are all very helpful and ready to give support to hte students. The campus is divides across the entire town but the bublic transportation works well and is very cheap. The university used odl factory buildings so the older areas are a bit confusing but after a day or two the map will be more clear.

name: University of Beira Interior
text: I am a student of aeronautical engineering at University of Beira Interior. Almost immediately after starting attending to classes I noticed that everyone in that pedagogical space was there to help me achieve the professional goals that I have. Whether it was the professors or my peers. As far as my opinion goes, the university has a way of making you feel in the right place. It’s a really good environment for growth as the teachers try to make sure you actually learn practical and theoretical aspects of your degree. The city where the university is located was never really my preferred choice as it is very calm, but there are still many ways to have fun, from going to beautiful parks to academic parties. If you like smaller cities where you get to know a lot of people UBI is for you.

name: University of Beira Interior
text: The University of Beira Interior, within the scope of the Communication Sciences program, has distinguished itself as a higher education institution committed to providing comprehensive and up-to-date education, preparing students for the dynamic challenges in the field of communication.

name: Universidade Católica Portuguesa
text: This University offers very good career opportunities with graduates well prepared for the job market. Most professors are genuinely interested in students’ learning and are approachable and supportive. Compared to many universities, the courses are more practice-oriented, which help students develop real-world skills and feel confident when entering the workforce.

name: Universidade Católica Portuguesa
text: My experience at Universidade Católica Portuguesa – Porto was very positive. The facilities are modern, well-maintained, and well equipped, providing a comfortable and efficient environment for research and academic work. Laboratory infrastructure and technical resources were readily available, which greatly supported day-to-day activities.

name: Universidade Católica Portuguesa
text: During my PhD, I spent three months at the Biotechnology School, and my experience was excellent. Thanks to the efforts of my colleagues in the research group, I learned a lot, and their kindness also made my stay wonderful.

name: Universidade Católica Portuguesa
text: My experience at the university was extremely positive. I did not come to attend regular classes, but rather to develop part of my research, and from the very beginning I was warmly welcomed, to the point that I extended my originally planned stay. The laboratories are very well structured, organized, and offer excellent conditions for scientific research. However, beyond the infrastructure, what truly stands out is the human aspect of the experience. I was exceptionally well received and guided by Professor Manuela Pintado, whose professionalism, availability, and academic excellence made a significant difference throughout my stay. She also appointed Tania Ribeiro to supervise my work, an extremely competent, dedicated, and intellectually outstanding professional, whose support was fundamental to the development of my research. I am deeply grateful for the trust, guidance, and support I received, which made this experience not only productive from a scientific perspective, but also personally enriching. I would highly recommend this university to students seeking a serious, well-structured, and genuinely supportive environment for research.

name: Universidade Católica Portuguesa
text: Hello :), my name is Manu, I’m an Italian student and I’ve been at the UCP for the first semester 2025/2026. Here in Católica I had the time of my life, I would recommend this experience to anyone. Related specifically to the university: every professor has always been super helpful in solving schedule and logistic problems, they had English classes even with just two Erasmus students in the room, I really appreciated it. As I wrote in the title: the only mistake could be not coming here. UCP is waiting for you and especially Porto, one of the most handsome cities in the world. Enjoy!

name: Universidade Católica Portuguesa
text: The Universidade Católica Portuguesa – Centro Regional do Porto enjoys a strong reputation, is well located, and offers comprehensive programs focused on the development of both hard and soft skills.

name: Universidade Católica Portuguesa
text: Overall, I enjoyed spending 1 month doing research at the University. I also had the opportunity to give a lecture and share my knowledge. There is a cafeteria with affordable prices for those who are not able to bring their own food, which was excellent.

name: Universidade Católica Portuguesa
text: The Catholic University was a home for me. I felt welcomed right away, by the professors, the administrators, and the students. I remember my first classes vividly. The professors were very clear about their syllabus; I already knew how to interact with each one of them and what my commitments would be throughout the semester. Each of them made themselves available immediately, understanding the difficulties that Erasmus students might naturally encounter, always listening to our needs and communicating calmly with them. Both during and after class, and outside of class, all the professors dedicated time and passion to reiterating topics that might not be clear and listening to our concerns. Every class was a new discovery; every professor fueled in me a desire to learn, discover, analyze, and study. The practical lab lessons allowed me to further understand, delve into specifics, and see and experience firsthand the work I’d previously done in theoretical classes. This is undoubtedly a huge plus for the university. Furthermore, the services it offers are excellent. Everyone there had a warm smile to share with the students, and this helped make it a more pleasant place. Furthermore, everyone cared about our well-being, and both the welcome days and the final days were wonderful and useful for immediately getting to know the new classmates who would be accompanying us on this experience. The words that best describe my experience here are definitely: WELCOMING, HELPFUL, KNOWLEDGE, COMMITMENT. Thank you, Catolica, for being a second home, thank you for taking care of me.

name: Universidade Católica Portuguesa
text: I spent three months at UCP, Escola Superior de Biotecnologia, under the supervision of Professor Manaia. It was a fantastic experience, both for the knowledge I acquired and for campus life. I have nothing to complain about. Everyone was kind and helpful, and the campus offers everything you could look for in a university.

name: Universidade Católica Portuguesa
text: I recommend it to everyone because I was very warmly welcomed and I learned a lot in a pleasant atmosphere. The subjects were very well discussed and we received all the materials in english. The professors stayed in touch with us and responded to our questions promptly.

name: University of Coimbra
text: My experience at University of Coimbra was genuinely positive, and I would confidently recommend it to anyone considering studying there. One of the first things that stood out to me was how well the university is integrated into the heart of the city. Coimbra itself is vibrant yet manageable, and having the university spread across multiple campuses (“polos”) gives it a dynamic and expansive feel without losing a sense of community. Campus life was truly one of its strongest points. There was a great balance between academic commitment and social life. The infrastructure also deserves recognition. There were plenty of green spaces where you could relax, unwind, or even study outdoors. In addition, the university offered well-equipped study areas, libraries, and comfortable spaces for both individual work and group collaboration. Academically, the quality of teaching was high. The professors were knowledgeable, dedicated, and often very approachable.

name: University of Coimbra
text: In the 5 years I have been study in FLUC almost all of my professore’s were very supportive and attentive of all of is student’s. In various cases some of them even left their way to help me in any way they could, regarding difficulties with papers or administrative issues.

name: University of Coimbra
text: My degree is really strong on the pratical component. In my experience the lectures are not the most interesting, and it’s mostly about you learning by yourself. Dealing with any bureaucratic situation usually turns into a nightmare due to weird and confuse internal process’s and not so well informed staff. The historic heritage, and the social life around the students association is amazing and offers a lot of opportunities for the students to learn skills, make conections and express themselves.

name: University of Coimbra
text: It is one of the best University in the country. All professionals are super kind and teach as with proud. The campus is magnific, large, clean and with new installations. The classes have the proper number of studens and we like each other. Coimbra is the best for me.

name: University of Coimbra
text: Studying at my university was an experience of contrasts: on the one hand, I faced the chaos of a teaching organization that often left us adrift, but on the other hand, I was fortunate to find the perfect setting to grow.

name: NOVA University Lisbon
text: What I liked about college, in general, was the possibility of experiencing Law in other areas or areas of knowledge (Anthropology, International Relations, Sociology, Economics, History, etc.). In addition, I experienced in the chair of “Interdisciplinary Legal Practice” the legal practice with classes taught by Law Firms. Despite this, the hours of classes were excessive and we often stayed all day to have classes. Another point that made me unhappy is the absence of group work and other means of continuous assessment other than the mandatory exam in some subjects, in addition to the lack of attendance or oral exams. For those who are interested in the course and would like to experience a more internationalized teaching, there are courses taught in the English language (B2), and students must take an English exam for certification held at the college after the exam seasons (Cambridge Exam). One aspect that I believe should be improved in the faculty would be the space, since we are studying in a temporary building and which will in the future be transferred to Carcavelos (next to the Nova School of Business and Economics). In terms of work, I believe that the faculty has assigned the necessary mechanisms for me to start my life in the legal field.

name: NOVA University Lisbon
text: It is a university that cares a lot about preparing its students in the best way possible for the future, and to do so it has a lot of different courses, in many subjects, and job/internship opportunities

name: NOVA University Lisbon
text: Located near the heart of Lisbon, inside the Campolide Campus, the NOVA Law School is perfect for international students who want to live in a good international atmosphere. Specific law courses in English for international students and a good student’s community to help you is what you can expect. Also, there is public accommodation inside the campus. Good professors and modern facilities, as well as career prospects.

name: University of Porto
text: In my opinion this university offers a very strong academic background with highly professional teachers and a wild variety of subjects. It can be quite intensive, but in the end the knowledge gained is a valuable asset.

name: University of Porto
text: If you want to have a good degree on higher education in Portugal, Porto is one of the best you can get. It has good facilities, most of its faculties are well known and have good international reputation.

name: University of Porto
text: The University of Porto is one of Portugal and Europe’s most prestigious universities, known for its strong academic reputation and solid research output. Located in a vibrant historic city, it offers a stimulating academic environment, diverse student life and good opportunities for research. Overall, it is widely regarded as a reliable choice for both Portuguese and international students seeking quality higher education in Europe.

name: University of Porto
text: University is awsome to go to the engineering degrees. Still needs to conect with higher ranked universities to have some great student exchanges in terms of knowledge. All and all it is a great university to study in Portugal, the best one.

name: University of Porto
text: The university has a good reputation and, in general, I think it is valid. It has a good team of teachers, the subjects are fairly divided, and the facilities are clean and polished. However, there are a few problems. Firstly, as they admit more students than the rooms can accommodate, the spaces seem a bit crowded. Secondly, they don’t have model-making studios. Also, the subjects are a bit outdated and could be renovated. And, finally, as a Brazilian in a Portuguese Uni, I felt a bit uncomfortable and overlooked, so I would bear that in mind. But they have the potential to easily adjust a few things and be more welcoming to foreigners (especially non-EU); it would 100% make the experience better.

name: Universidade de Lisboa
text: Joining NOVA IMS felt scary at first. I had so many doubts: the language, the professors, the difficulty of the degree, whether this was really what I wanted to study, what career paths it could open, and even whether my grades would be enough. I applied and, at first, I was not accepted. My immediate thought was: “Maybe this is not meant for me.” But then, in the second phase, I received the email saying I had been accepted into NOVA IMS. Suddenly, my worries changed. I had already missed four weeks of classes, and I was afraid I would not be able to keep up. Three years later, I can say that joining NOVA IMS was the best decision I made. All those doubts slowly disappeared. I found a place with great professionals, approachable professors, and an environment where people are genuinely kind, supportive, and willing to help. NOVA IMS gave me the motivation to learn more, get involved, and push myself outside my comfort zone. Today, I am proud to be part of this community. Looking back, I would tell my past self: if you are scared, go for it anyway. Sometimes the things that frighten you the most are the ones that open the best doors.

name: Universidade de Lisboa
text: Studying the Master’s in Data Driven Marketing, specializing in Data Science, at NOVA Information Management School has been a very rewarding experience. Coming from a background in Advertising and Marketing, the program has definitely been challenging at times, especially because of the more technical and analytical subjects. However, it has also been an incredible learning journey that is giving me skills and knowledge I truly believe will be essential and highly differentiating for my future career.

name: Universidade de Lisboa
text: Nova IMS is an amazing university that sits slightly elevated, offering a great view of Lisbon right from the front yard. The location is perfect. The professors are highly accomplished, super friendly and incredibly reasonable. You can ask them any question and they will answer without ever getting frustrated. Nova IMS also hosts great seminars and networking events that really help students build their careers. Campus life is wonderful, with so many different activities to participate in!!

name: Universidade de Lisboa
text: I am currently enrolled in the Master’s in Data-Driven Marketing with a specialization in Digital Marketing and Analytics at NOVA IMS, and my experience so far has been extremely positive. The university is very welcoming, creating an environment where students feel supported from day one. One of my initial concerns was the language, but the fact that the program is taught in English has not been a barrier at all. The professors make the content very accessible, ensuring everyone follows along easily. In terms of workload, I find the difficulty level to be well-balanced. I honestly have no negative points to mention so far. I highly recommend NOVA IMS to anyone looking to advance their career in this field!

name: Universidade de Lisboa
text: Studying at NOVA IMS has been a great experience. The academic environment is dynamic and engaging, with an excellent student life and many opportunities to grow both personally and professionally. The professors are always attentive, supportive, and genuinely care about their students’ success. The faculty is outstanding, and the courses are strongly connected to the real job market, with a strong focus on innovation, practical skills, and future-oriented learning.

name: Universidade de Lisboa
text: NOVA IMS is an amazing university. In my opinion, it really prepares its students for real life’s challenges. Professors are always ready to help you in anything that comes up and the Campus Life is awesome, since the academic environment between students is very good and warming.

name: Universidade de Lisboa
text: Great university with an amazing infraestructure and amazing professionals. On my master’s, the classes were given in english and all professors helped out if needed. Good methodologies and interesting program. By choosing some of the courses we can do, we can make the degree more personalized and fit to our interests. On the thesis, the supervisors are really helful and we can choose from a list of topics pre-existent or create one from scratch, which can be helpful for future studies/some work areas.

name: Universidade de Lisboa
text: I think that Nova IMS is a great university for studying data driven degrees, the quality of instruction is excelent and the teachers are really helpful: Positives -Teachers care that the students learn the subject than just give the material. – All the material gets updated quickly according to new trends on the industry -Most of the classes have a theoretical class and a practical class to apply the skills learned – The staff is really nice and helpful Negatives – Some specific subjects are not up to the standards compared to the rest of the subjects

name: Universidade de Lisboa
text: What I liked the most was the type of teaching, which was quite international and which appealed to the constant interaction of students, both during classes and after classes. The teachers are always available to help and answer questions.

name: Universidade de Lisboa
text: This year couldn’t be better, having in consideration this whole situation. The faculty managed to offer everything students from previous years got, but remotely. It’s a programme that actually cares about the students and each situation providing very good academic services.

name: Chalmers University of Technology
text: The overall study environment is encouraging and inspiring, while few courses have been so good that you felt bad after finishing them. The professors were really helpful and open minded. Campus does not fail to get you busy.

name: Chalmers University of Technology
text: As a science student, it is expected of me to do project work and assignment but the time spent on these are so long. I wish it could be shortened, especially as I work. But I still love my lecturers

name: University of Gothenburg
text: I have had a fantastic experience studying at the University of Gothenburg. It has exceeded my expectations in every aspect, and I highly recommend this institution for several key reasons:

name: University of Gothenburg
text: My experience at the University of Gothenburg was both academically enriching and personally transformative. I conducted my Master’s thesis , where I had the opportunity to work in a highly supportive and well equipped research environment. The university provides excellent laboratory facilities, particularly for environmental chemistry and contamination research, and promotes a strong culture of scientific independence and critical thinking. My supervisors were knowledgeable, approachable, and encouraged me to develop both my analytical and experimental skills.

name: University of Gothenburg
text: I think the University of Gothenburg is excellent. I have gone to several universities, and UoG has been the one I’ve liked the most. The teachers are down-to-earth and approachable, which makes lectures and seminars more enjoyable than when there is a clear hierarchy between teacher and student.

name: University of Gothenburg
text: The University of Gothenburg is a great university, they are very welcoming to international students, they also have a broad range of course offered. They provided useful information about studying at the university. One thing I do not like about the school is the inability to provide accommodation arrangement for foreign students because getting accommodation is a huge challenge here in the city of Gothenburg. So, my number tip for you would be to make sure you make arrangements for accommodation before arriving in the city.

name: University of Gothenburg
text: I am in the first year of my master’s, so I just started experiencing this university and its program. However, I immediately noticed that overall the professor and student service team try their best to make the students feel comfortable and motivated. I like that the programme is always one course at a time, rather than multiple at once. That really helps me to get into a specific topic in detail.

name: Karolinska Institutet
text: I love my university as it is student centered and provides everything we need . The classes assist you to think outside the box with group session and projects. Also the mentorship programs provide an insight of what the future would look like

name: Karolinska Institutet
text: Starting with the Swedish academic Calendar where courses are taken one at a time, I love that this lets students focus and grow their knowledge on one topic at a time and not have different mixed theories all taught in the same time frame. I also love the cultural and academic diversity of the professors and administration teams as it allows for students to understand how their newly acquired knowledge can be applied in different contexts

name: Karolinska Institutet
text: Karolinska Institutet stands out as a remarkable institution, boasting an impressive work ranking. Situated at the heart of Stockholm city, the Solna campus offers an opportunity to immerse yourself in the sights and sounds of the city.

name: Karolinska Institutet
text: Karolinska Institutet is renowned for its innovative and pioneering contributions to the field of sciences, and this reputation is well-deserved. Currently, I am enrolled in the inaugural run of the Master’s Program, and I must commend the university for its diligent organization. Although some minor adjustments have been made along the way, the institution demonstrates a remarkable willingness to receive and act upon feedback, valuing our active involvement in enhancing the course for future cohorts.

name: Karolinska Institutet
text: Karolinska is doing a very good job in creating a great educational foundation for becoming a psychologist. With a lot of research done, there are several great and knowledgeable professors. It provides a lot for future work in the area.

name: KTH Royal Institute of Technology
text: A university that supports research and innovative ideas rooted in entrepreneurship. The strong support and alumni network also help with career development and life after university for students who have studied at KTH.

name: KTH Royal Institute of Technology
text: The university offers world class research facility. Inclusive culture and opportunity to combine theories with practical application. The instructors are very friendly and engaging in the classroom.

name: KTH Royal Institute of Technology
text: KTH Royal Institute of Technology offers a top-tier education in engineering and technology, with a strong focus on renewable energy, innovation, and sustainability. The professors are knowledgeable, and the curriculum is well-structured, combining theoretical learning with practical applications.

name: KTH Royal Institute of Technology
text: The library is amazing. The atmosphere motivates you to study and become a better version of yourself. I am here for only 3 weeks and I feel like that this place is perfect study environment and everyone is super helpful!

name: KTH Royal Institute of Technology
text: The professors in KTH are research-oriented so attention to teaching is generally less. Most of the professors I got were really good researchers but not very good teachers. The courses, however, are very diverse and KTH gives an option to choose from a super-wide range so it provides you with the flexibility of what you want to learn and which skills you want to develop,

name: Linköping University
text: The university was amazing in many ways. First of all, the campus was very beautiful and modern, and practical. I loved the library and the different facilities that it offered. Although most of the times it was full of people. The classrooms were fully equipped and the professors always helpful and open to discuss about they ways they can improove. Overall, the experience was very positive!

name: Linköping University
text: For my program, I loved the freedom and guidance we got by the teachers. Overall, the help from the information desk was clear. The university gives you a lot of opportunities to come up with your own ideas to transform into projects

name: Linköping University
text: When arriving to Linköping University, it’s not an impressive sight for the eye- but when school starts and the community begins to show itself, it’s amazing. The university has a variety of activities and everyone is welcome despite of what you’re studying or age. People are welcoming, the teachers are kind and understanding and the school offers various of different lifestyles depending on what suits you. It can be a bit overwhelming at first before you get a grasp about it, but as soon as you do- you get friends, memories and a great education all at one place!

name: Linköping University
text: The campus culture is amazing.

name: Linköping University
text: Linköpings University is one of those universities in Sweden with rich university history and culture. You are already introduced to student life with entertaining and eye-opening performances on your first day. It is nothing you would ever expect to see on your first day, and the good thing about it is that it actually calms your nerves a bit. The compound and environment are always clean and calm. People are very nice, tidy, and very willing to help. There are always student parties if anyone is interested in the party life. For sport lovers, there are at least 5 different sports that one can take part in, such as football (soccer), basketball, table tennis, volleyball, and badminton, to name a few. There is also a golf venue right by the campus, and for those who like water sports, there is something for you too. There is a sports center on the campus with a fully equipped gym. The campus also has a large number of group rooms where you can privately study with your friends without any interruptions. There are also a number of computer laboratories where one can make use of the university computers. The campus buildings are, however, only accessible between 6am and 11pm, which is a downside for night owls, but the upsides are way more to pass on this university and the experiences it offers.

name: Lund University
text: The student life is probably one of the best in the world. The education is high level and the diversity is great! The sustainability is definitely a high priority in the university and the university is a global leader on this as well.

name: Lund University
text: There aren’t many vibrant club activities here, and many of the professors in my Asian Studies department don’t actively engage with you; you practically don’t know each other after class. If you’re really looking for intensive academic training and personal connections, I don’t think this school is for you. There aren’t many vibrant club activities here, and many of the professors in my Asian Studies department don’t actively engage with you; you practically don’t know each other after class. If you’re really looking for intensive academic training and personal connections, I don’t think this school is for you. Furthermore, the potential job opportunities it offers make some positions seem practically meaningless.

name: Lund University
text: Sometimes challeging and hard work, sometimes it was easy with studies and lectures. I think it was the best experience in my life. Meeting a new people from over the whole world. Professors were also nice and friendly.

name: Lund University
text: I liked the structure of the program. Also, the department is very medium-sized, and the staff has very strong professional relationships with one another. You feel like you’re part of a community. Initially, I found the Swedish education system challenging to get used to. Unlike my previous experiences, we have fewer classes and are expected to do much reading independently. Additionally, we take one class at a time. However, by the end of the semester, I began to enjoy this approach.

name: Lund University
text: The university is beautiful, there is no doubt about that. Although it is one of the most multicultural campuses in the world, the course I took was not inclusive for foreign students. The course was advertised as a course designed specifically for foreigners, with classes in English. In practice, many of the classes on the syllabus were actually in Swedish, and the ones that were in English gave exercises or texts in Swedish. I even had a disagreement with one of the professors who, although he was teaching a class that was supposed to be entirely in English, brought slides in Swedish and spoke exclusively in Swedish. When I asked during the break if the class shouldn’t be in English, he ridiculed me in front of the class and said that if I was uncomfortable, I should have said so beforehand. The universitys advisors were very understanding, but in the end, I had to give up many of the assigned subjects and replace them with subjects that had nothing to do with my field, just because they were, in fact, taught in English.

name: Stockholm University
text: Honestly one of the best decisions I’ve made. I did my BA in Business Administration here and then came back for the MSc in Operations Management and Control. Yeah, I liked it enough to return. The professors are something else. You can tell these people actually live and breathe what they teach. Had a few lecturers who completely changed how I think about certain topics. The kind where you leave a lecture and you’re still thinking about it on the way home. The Scandinavian teaching style is hard to explain until you experience it. They respect your intelligence. No unnecessary pressure but the bar is high and you feel it. Books and articles they assign are actually relevant and up to date. Not the same textbook from 2003 that half the world uses. They clearly put thought into what they give you. Staff were great too. Every time I needed something whether academic or just admin stuff someone actually helped. No runaround. And Stockholm itself… come on. You’re studying in one of the most beautiful cities in the world. That doesn’t hurt motivation at all. Would I recommend it? Already have, multiple times.

name: Stockholm University
text: At every course I took at SU I had highly approchable, knowledgeable and professional educators. School administration worked smoothly and flawlessly. Campus life was excellent, with a wide assortment of pubs and activities, as well as student health and sport amenities.

name: Stockholm University
text: My experience has been mostly good. Some classes were interesting and easy to follow, especially when the teachers explained things clearly and took time to help students. A few teachers really stood out because they were supportive and made the lessons more engaging.

name: Stockholm University
text: “Manga studies” is a very interesting course. Theres a lot of freedom when it comes to assignement. The teacher is really nxoce and will answer all your questions/talk about any course related subject.

name: Umeå University
text: Even if Umea University was not my first choice in Sweden. I do not regreat to go there where I got my master in biology. The place is very nice, and the university is also a good one.

name: Umeå University
text: Good university, with alot of international students, the structure is nice for the winter and most of the professors are nice too. The chemistry department need more renovations and more organisation.

name: Uppsala University
text: The structure and instructional quality at Uppsala University exceeded my expectations. The program’s emphasis on international experiences enlarged my outlook and prepared me for a profession on a global scale. I am grateful for the rich experiences and information I gained at Uppsala University.

name: Uppsala University
text: My experience at this university has been fantastic. The teaching, tutors, and students all showcased high levels of quality and competitiveness. The content provided was consistently good, and the library was impressive, offering a wide range of books. The architecture and layout of the campus are modern, with friendly students and an amazing university town. The staff are excellent, always addressing concerns promptly, and there are great options for accommodation.

name: Uppsala University
text: As a PhD researcher and educator at Uppsala University, I have had the privilege of experiencing this prestigious institution from multiple perspectives—student, mentor, and researcher. Uppsala University offers a unique and enriching academic environment, with a strong focus on research-driven learning and an international outlook that fosters global collaboration.

name: Uppsala University
text: The university’s facilities and resources are truly exceptional, providing a world-class learning environment. The academic programs are rigorous and challenging, preparing students for success in their chosen fields. The campus community is diverse and inclusive, with a wide range of extracurricular activities and clubs. The faculty are experts in their fields, providing guidance and leadership.

name: Uppsala University
text: As a student enrolled in the Game Design course at Uppsala University, I am deeply disappointed with the overall experience and quality of the program. From the outset, my ability to engage with and succeed in the material was severely hampered by the attitudes and behaviors of my peers and the general approach taken by the course instructors.

name: V.N. Karazin Kharkiv National University
text: This is a top university with a highly qualified teaching staff, where each professor is a unique, strong individual, possessing not only theoretical knowledge but also practical experience. It also offers an engaging student life. This impressive, historically valuable building is located in the city center, next to Freedom Square and beautiful parks. It’s worth noting that the admission requirements for state-funded programs are quite high. I highly recommend the university! It’s a source of pride to study there.

name: V.N. Karazin Kharkiv National University
text: One of the best universities in Europe, a sufficient knowledge base is laid for further career growth and a thirst for knowledge. I would recommend it to an any student, wanting to obtain a high level of education.

name: Kyiv National Economic University
text: I studied at a program that had just been established, related to media and sociology. It wasn’t anything very practical, but there was a cohort of teachers who really taught and worked through the material so that I feel pretty confident about some of the topics. Unfortunately, almost all training fell on the quarantine period. However, the time we went was great. A very good student atmosphere, there are places to eat, there are holidays, there are places to express yourself. So, in general, I define this experience as positive

name: Kyiv National Economic University
text: Great prestigious university with good staff. Very interesting program. New friends. I would like to change more modern infrastructure and facilities. More practical part during lessons. ERASMUS and internships possibilities

name: Kyiv National Economic University
text: So the university itself is corrupted, but the thirst for superiors to tear off money from all that can sometimes be struck. There are less than a third of students attending a pair because only half of the teachers are adequate. Boring and not interesting teaching leaves much to be desired. In general, nothing was wasted just time !!

name: Kyiv National Economic University
text: I chose the university, as I arranged the courses that I wanted to go through. During 4 years of training, it became clear that corruption is now absorbed by everyone. There was not much interesting, as the lecturers not only read how they looked at the clock, but rather to finish it. Thanks to the paternal money, because nobody wants to watch your knowledge, which I gave myself for all this time, with a grief half finished the university and got a crust. One single plus is that there is a good contingent in the group with which the friends are left.

name: Taras Shevchenko National University of Kyiv
text: This is an internationally recognized university, studying here is prestigious, and you will truly receive a high-quality theoretical foundation.The teachers are considered the best in the country, but of course, no one has cancelled out the human factor and the nature of teaching.My experience studying at the Faculty of Economics gave me a good foundation for statistics, but of course, everything is individual and depends primarily on your desire to learn.

name: Taras Shevchenko National University of Kyiv
text: Studying at KNU is a real challenge. I chose this university because of its status, and my expectations were generally met, although there were some nuances. The Red Building is certainly impressive in its history and aesthetics, but the real student life for most departments takes place in the buildings at VDNG. The atmosphere there is simpler, but cozy in its own way.

name: Taras Shevchenko National University of Kyiv
text: Taras Shevchenko National University of Kyiv is one of Ukraine’s most prestigious and oldest universities, known for its strong academic traditions and high educational standards. It has a unique reputation, attracting talented students and researchers. The university offers programs in many different fields, ranging from law and philosophy, to even geodesy. I enjoy this university for many of reasons. I can be broad, and write a hundred, but here are the main ones: the opportunities that it provides to its students, the location of its campuses, the students that surround me, the high-quality education and especially, the student life, or more precisely, its quality. The level of overall friendliness, and activities outside the university curriculum inspire me. I can’t highlight anything bad about this university. Perhaps I would like to have more practice in real life cases, but who doesn’t? I think it’s more a problem of all universities across the world, and I believe that this one has honestly earned its place on their list. Professors know their subjects and can answer on all your questions during the lectures and seminars. They are surprisingly very kind and wise. I am sure if someone took me back a few years from now, I wouldn’t change my mind about the university that I choose. Not in a million different universes.

name: Taras Shevchenko National University of Kyiv
text: I’m not completely happy with my studies—university isn’t exactly what I expected. But it’s not like I had big dreams about it anyway. I chose this major because it was the only one that didn’t irritate me. Studying is interesting, and university is definitely useful for personal growth and making connections. But I enjoy working and doing my own thing much more. I’m not a fan of our system, so university doesn’t really impress me. Still, education is important.

name: Taras Shevchenko National University of Kyiv
text: I’m in my 4th year at Kyiv National University of Taras Shevchenko, Institute of Journalism to be exact.

name: Igor Sikorsky Kyiv Polytechnic Institute
text: Studying here at Igor Sikorsky Kyiv Polytechnic Institute is pretty intense but worth it. The university gives a strong technical foundation, and you really feel the level of the place. Some professors are amazing and really helpful, others are just okay. The workload can be heavy, but if you stay consistent, it’s manageable

name: Igor Sikorsky Kyiv Polytechnic Institute
text: When I was applying to this university, I read many reviews, and they were very positive. Articles and videos also made the professors look excellent. However, once I started studying, especially in my second year, I saw the reality and I can say that KPI is going downhill.

name: Igor Sikorsky Kyiv Polytechnic Institute
text: There are a lot of things to improve, but in Ukraine its best what we have. Cool and amazing comunity, interesting social life, useful experience and approach to solve anything. What to improve: actual knowledge required for subjects, buildings repair and heating)))

name: Lviv Polytechnic National University
text: Lviv Polytechnic is a great university with a wide range of programs and helpful professors. I really enjoyed the practical courses and the chance to work on real-world projects. However, some of the facilities could be improved, and the administrative process was sometimes slow. Overall, I would recommend it because it offers a strong education and good opportunities for students.

name: Lviv Polytechnic National University
text: Frankly speaking, the university is really a freebie. Sometimes there are cool, wise teachers, but unfortunately they are not able to pass on their knowledge to the students. In general, it all depends on the desire of the students and the department in which you plan to study. So good luck

name: Lviv Polytechnic National University
text: I advise all of those who want to get the maximum out of student life to join this university. Especially activists, because there are all the opportunities for a creative boom. This university is a diminished copy of modern active life. I will not forget to mention the level of education, which is one of the highest in Ukraine. And about scientific achievements, I’m generally silent 🙂

name: Lviv Polytechnic National University
text: Recently graduated from the National Academy of Sciences “Institute of Geodesy”, I wanted to highlight the high level teachers of this institute, during the time of the student’s opportunity to work with different devices, and in practice, to feel that such a geodesy. Having lived in a hostel for 6 years, we will say the terms “good”. The University provides many opportunities for the rest of the students: KVN, festivals, competitions, sports events, etc., that is, it is not sad. After the end there were mostly positive emotions, with pleasure passed the student way again with the above-mentioned University.

name: Lviv Polytechnic National University
text: It was the best choice of school in my life. In this university, I received the best speciality – engineer of ecology. I recommend this university to those, who want to get a modern high-level education. An additional positive – this is delicious food in the dining room and cheerful students. Especially I am amazed by the thought that I studied in the classroom where Maria Curie taught.

name: Ivan Franko National University of Lviv
text: In English: I think Ivan Franko National University of Lviv is a great institution with a strong academic reputation. I liked its historical atmosphere, central location, and professional professors. There’s not much to dislike, but some administrative processes could be improved. Yes, I would definitely recommend it!

name: Ivan Franko National University of Lviv
text: Studying at LNU was my dream for many years as it is supposed to be one of the best universities in Ukraine. Through four years of studies I understood that my objectives were too high and, unfortunately, I didn’t receive what I was promised. The educational system is quite old-fashion, there’s a lack of practice and too much material that is unapplicable in the real life. Nevertheless, there’re many dedicated professors who make a great effort to apply modern methods to the curriculum and give the students the maximum they can. With that being said, I wouldn’t recommend you this university if you are looking for modern approaches to education.

name: Ivan Franko National University of Lviv
text: I really don’t like this university. Some professors are rude and strange, don’t explain the material as it should be done. They twice lost my documents and said I did not bring it. The studying process is badly organised, we receive our schedule 1-2 days before studying should start, we receive the dates of our exams one-two weeks before their start.

name: Ivan Franko National University of Lviv
text: Ivan Franko University is one of the oldest universities in Eastern Europe and the oldest university in Ukraine !. After three years of study at the university, I can say with confidence that here everyone can get an opportunity to achieve their goal, and the dean’s office always meets any initiatives from the students. Participation in scientific conferences, the creation of a student club, the organization of an event inside the walls of the university-all this can easily be approved and supported, and if successful, such initiatives are encouraged and funded. The hostel here is quite comfy.Push it and the old university, but I can recommend it to others as there are very good teachers here who will always go to the meeting!

name: Ivan Franko National University of Lviv
text: This university is a great place to start an education when you don’t know what you are looking for. First, four years of studies give a good basic understanding of a major you chose. The minuses include too many classes vaguely connected to the major and slightly outdated educational program.

name: National Aviation University
text: The university equipments are old and does not match the program’s requirements , most of professors don’t speak a good English , even though the program in English , I don’t recommend it honestly because you could get a better education somewhere else.

name: National University of Kyiv-Mohyla Academy
text: I was dreaming to study in this university, as it is one of the places to study in Ukraine. I joined the Master Program of Economics. It was a wonderful experience!

name: National University of Kyiv-Mohyla Academy
text: Small University, but very well known and considered as one of the best in Kyiv. A University that makes steps towards European standards of education. Has partnerships that allow going study abroad. As for student life.. options of student associations are limited. There is also no ESN in Kyiv yet. But there is AEGEE-Kyiv, and it is quite alive.

name: California Institute of Technology
text: Caltech’s facilities are top-notch and really help create an excellent learning environment. Students have everything they need to succeed and excel in their studies. The research facilities, libraries, and recreational options are all fantastic. Overall, it’s a great place for personal and intellectual growth.

name: California Institute of Technology
text: Lecturers foster a very encouraging and stimulating environment in which we feel comfortable asking questions and receiving assistance. The Caltech teachers genuinely care about the students and make sure we comprehend everything. By adding engaging exercises, they even manage to make learning enjoyable. When we need additional resources or clarification, they are always available to us throughout business hours. Seeing their enthusiasm for their subjects and their sincere desire for our success is incredibly motivating.

name: California Institute of Technology
text: Lecturers at Caltech go above to ensure that we get the best learning experience possible because they genuinely care about us as students. They foster an inviting and encouraging environment where we feel free to seek assistance and ask concerns. They are not just authorities in their fields but also masters in simplifying difficult ideas and providing relatable examples. They even use interactive activities to make learning enjoyable! During free hours, they are always accessible and delighted to offer further information and explanation. Their enthusiasm for their subjects and their sincere desire for our success is incredibly motivating. I consider myself extremely fortunate to have such amazing teachers at Caltech! With them, learning is easy.
