name: California Institute of Technology
text: Teachers are excellent at simplifying difficult topics into easy and broken down concepts. To aid in our understanding of the subject matter, they employ interactive exercises, graphics, and real-world examples. In addition, they are quite amiable and ready to respond to inquiries or offer further details. Learning has becomes less difficult and more pleasurable under their direction.

name: California Institute of Technology
text: The university is blessed with the best educators, they have the students welfare at heart, they make sure students understand concepts being taught in class. Also they have a wonderful curriculum, which make learning very easy for all students. I really appreciate the school.

name: California Institute of Technology
text: Even from my brief experience at Caltech for Pre-Frosh Weekend, I was impressed at how seriously my future upperclassmen work hard and play hard.
author: Jianing Jenny, Plano TX

name: California Institute of Technology
text: California Institute of Technology is an amazing school. Of all the colleges that I looked at, Caltech is definitely my top choice.
author: Julie, Laurel MD

name: California Institute of Technology
text: This school, being one of the top in the nation, is naturally one that is going to encourage learning, especially with its small class sizes.
author: Addam, Garden Grove CA

name: California Institute of Technology
text: This school has a very rigorous academic curriculum that has expanded both my understanding and my appreciation for the physical sciences.
author: Mateo, Houston TX

name: California Institute of Technology
text: You will learn more than you thought was possible. Sometimes it will seem impossible. It isn't.
author: Kimberly, Bloomington IL

name: Columbia University
text: As a science major, the education was rigorous and prepared me for the real world. At times, it can be a bit impersonal due to it’s size. I can not recommend Columbia University enough for either undergraduate or graduate studies.

name: Columbia University
text: I just love that the university is in the heart of New York. Having the city as your campus hehe, you’d have to be here to experience it ngl. You just have to be. The vibes that come with it is unmatched in every way possible. Plus there’s the culture and the FOOD. If Columbia Uni isn’t your go to I don’t know what else to tell you.

name: Columbia University
text: Columbia’s location in New York City was a big part of my college experience. It felt like the whole city was my campus, with all the cultural and food options it had to offer. The university also has a distinct campus atmosphere within the city, where a strong college community is formed. It was a truly unique experience, where the city played an integral role in shaping my college years.

name: Columbia University
text: Columbia University boasts an exquisite campus situated in one of the most influential cities globally and is known for its diverse student body. With an abundance of opportunities, it can be overwhelming to navigate the myriad of choices available. No matter who you are, our campus offers a plethora of clubs, sports teams, and organizations that cater to all interests and backgrounds.

name: Columbia University
text: I like this University. I’ve learned a lot of things there, and I’ve managed to make lots of new friends, create a lot of new connections, and the teachers there are nice and helpful. They even helped me with my work problems and personal problems.

name: Columbia University
text: It can be the best four years of your life and make all your dreams come true.
author: Esteban, Fullerton CA

name: Columbia University
text: Between the Common Core and the city of New York, it is difficult to conceive of an education more intellectually stimulating than that which Columbia provides.
author: Nathan, Cincinnati OH

name: Columbia University
text: Columbia University is extremely challenging and therefore extremely rewarding.
author: Krizia, Fort Bragg NC

name: Columbia University
text: Columbia is easily one of the most intellectually stimulating universities in the north!
author: Eurick, Yonkers NY

name: Columbia University
text: In terms of academics, the most interesting and unique part of the Columbia curriculum is the Core.
author: James, Atlanta GA

name: Columbia University
text: You can't go wrong with Columbia, it's a name everyone knows and it's great in everything.
author: Student, NJ

name: Columbia University
text: Although I've only attended Columbia for one semester, I have yet to meet any professors or grad students who haven't provided an informative and unique perspective on their chosen field.
author: Natalie, Seattle WA

name: Columbia University
text: The amount of learning that takes place in one semester at Columbia is truly amazing.
author: Nina, Baldwin NY

name: Columbia University
text: I feel that Columbia's Core Curriculum provides a nice, well-rounded education that many people pursuing engineering may lack.
author: Anon, NY

name: Duke University
text: Duke University is renowned for its rigorous academic programs and vibrant campus life. The university offers a diverse range of majors and research opportunities, supported by world-class faculty.

name: Duke University
text: The professors at Duke university exhibit exceptional commitment to the success and well-being of their students by ensuring their academic growth and fostering a supportive social atmosphere. Moreover, the entire community is recognized for its amicability and inclusiveness.

name: Duke University
text: Duke is truly remarkable in every aspect. The campus is stunning, and our professors are not only highly intelligent and accomplished, but also kind-hearted. They have a great sense of humor and offer valuable insights that make you easily engage with every class. Moreover, these professors are incredibly supportive, bent on helping you excel. They possess a deep understanding of their students and our educational needs. Many of them exhibit genuine dedication towards their profession and genuinely care about our education. Additionally, they are exceptionally knowledgeable and well-prepared to serve as guides towards achieving any future goals.

name: Duke University
text: Duke University is renowned for providing an exceptional academic experience. The admissions committee excels in attracting talented individuals from around the globe. My time at Duke has been incredibly demanding yet inspiring, thanks to the ambitious nature of my fellow students. Engaging with peers expands your perspective and fosters lifelong connections. The friendships I’ve formed at Duke are cherished every day.

name: Duke University
text: The university is committed to maintaining high educational standards, it is evident in how their faculty and lecturers work together along side the students. Nothing feels out of date and irrelevant and or out of reach. The staffs are friendly and very approachable, the professors are the knowledgeable which in my opinion is what makes this possible. They just know how to communicate what you need to know.

name: Duke University
text: Duke's campus is absolutely beautiful.
author: Ariana, Fort Myers FL

name: Duke University
text: Duke is a top-notch research university with a massive amount of school spirit.
author: BlueDevil

name: Duke University
text: Duke is located on the most beautiful campus in America, right in the great state of North Carolina.
author: KZ

name: Duke University
text: Duke's a diverse school with students of all sorts of races and backgrounds.
author: Elisabeth, Durham NC

name: Duke University
text: Duke isn't a world-renowned institution for nothing.
author: Dukie

name: Duke University
text: We cover a lot of material and very quickly.
author: Larissa, Clayton NC

name: Harvard University
text: In honours-only small majors tutoring is fantastic, in my experience, including one-to-ones in both junior and senior year. Some of the larger courses are taught with very mixed quality, eg by TAs with poor English. Great experience overall though, with many opportunities to get involved in varied interest groups and sides of campus life, and interesting academic challenges.

name: Harvard University
text: Teaching Methodology at Harvard University

name: Harvard University
text: I attended Harvard Extension School, which offers world class education at a more reasonable price. The school is flexible so students can take classes around their work schedule. The things I learned in class were usually practical enough that I could apply them immediately in everyday life, and that is what I loved the most. Students are held to a high standard, which helps them improve quickly. Harvard has many clubs to choose from and more than enough opportunity to meet new people. The only downside is that the culture is such that the school tells students what to think instead of inviting them to explore different viewpoints. I highly recommend HES, particularly if you are a student with a job.

name: Harvard University
text: Studying at Harvard has been a transformative experience. The professors are world-class, deeply knowledgeable, and genuinely invested in student growth. The campus is a stunning mix of history and innovation, with inspiring libraries and vibrant spaces for interaction.

name: Harvard University
text: Harvard University is undeniably one of the most prestigious and renowned institutions of higher learning globally, and there are several aspects to admire about it. Firstly, Harvard’s rich history and tradition of academic excellence are unparalleled, with a faculty composed of leading scholars and researchers across various fields. The university’s rigorous academic programs and emphasis on critical thinking foster an environment conducive to intellectual growth and innovation. Additionally, Harvard’s vast resources, including state-of-the-art facilities, extensive libraries, and research centers, provide students with unparalleled opportunities for exploration and discovery.

name: Harvard University
text: Harvard University is truly among the most exclusive schools to be found anywhere on the globe.
author: Aus10

name: Harvard University
text: The students are great, teamwork is encouraged (I've heard from transfers that it is to a unique degree).
author: A Current Sophomore

name: Harvard University
text: Harvard is a home for outstanding students, who love to learn for the sole purpose of personal development.
author: Sarah, Manchester NH

name: Harvard University
text: Harvard is an absolutely incredible institution built on the principle of continual learning.
author: Cat, Cambridge MA

name: Harvard University
text: Harvard University courses – even introductory classes – are phenomenal!
author: Jeanie, San Diego CA

name: Harvard University
text: It's impossible not to learn a lot at Harvard, with such a wide range of classes taught by professors who are often experts in their field.
author: Emily

name: Harvard University
text: You will learn tons and only from the best and the brightest.
author: Axel

name: Harvard University
text: Harvard provides the type of education that helps you to become a better thinker.
author: Cindy

name: Harvard University
text: Libraries are huge – Widener stacks are legendary. Two great gyms, gyms in the basement of the houses too. I love the campus!
author: Charles, Applied Statistics (2022)

name: Johns Hopkins University
text: JHU’s Advanced Academic Programs are a perfect opportunity for grad students looking to pursue a degree in niche interests. Mark Farrington, the head and founder of the Teaching Writing program, has a firm commitment to developing the students in the program and pushing them to commit themselves to writing that is beyond their traditional scope and beneficial to multiple different aspects of their careers. Classes that stood out were AS.492.612. Teaching Writing, AS.492.635. Teaching and Writing Nonfiction, AS.492.650. Reading Like a Write, and AS.492.690. Residency: Best Practices in the Teaching of Writing.

name: Johns Hopkins University
text: Johns Hopkins University was an incredible place to study. The instructors are very helpful. The large, contemporary campus offers a wide range of activities. All in all, an excellent university that is demanding and fruitful.

name: Johns Hopkins University
text: Johns Hopkins University is known for its exceptional professors, diverse faculty, and state-of-the-art facilities. The university offers modern classrooms, well-stocked libraries, research laboratories, and advanced technology centers, fostering an environment conducive to learning and innovation. Students can explore their interests and excel in their chosen fields through clubs, organizations, and extracurricular activities. The university also hosts numerous social events and gatherings, fostering a sense of community and allowing students to connect with peers. Overall, Johns Hopkins University offers an enriching academic experience with exceptional professors, top-notch facilities, and a vibrant student life, allowing students to thrive academically, intellectually, and socially.

name: Johns Hopkins University
text: I have experienced a welcoming and inclusive atmosphere at Johns Hopkins University, which has made my transition from high school to college much smoother. Through the diverse range of activities and clubs offered, Hopkins has provided me with numerous opportunities to be involved and engaged.

name: Johns Hopkins University
text: It’s a Superb School , John Hopkins is an encounter extraordinarily merited. The climate is well disposed, individuals are great , educators are caring yet severe drill sergeants, and school has many projects to get into. It’s an excellent location. we have astounding and frequently truly open teachers. The teachers are superb and really maintain that their understudies should succeed.

name: Johns Hopkins University
text: Hopkins prides itself on making incredible opportunities accessible to everyone.
author: Katrina, Nampa ID

name: Johns Hopkins University
text: The atmosphere is challenging but the people are willing to help.
author: Marysol, Dundalk MD

name: Johns Hopkins University
text: I know of many professors that teach above and beyond what is available in required readings.
author: KC, New York NY

name: Johns Hopkins University
text: The professors are generally approachable and they know their stuff.
author: Anonymous

name: Johns Hopkins University
text: Johns Hopkins does have a reputation for being academically rigorous.
author: Caroline, Newton MA

name: Johns Hopkins University
text: All of the classes are full of material and even the intro classes go above and beyond.
author: Alyssa, Grand Blanc MI

name: Johns Hopkins University
text: Even the intro classes that everyone takes are very intense.
author: Alison, Berwyn IL

name: Massachusetts Institute of Technology
text: It is a top ranked university that lived up to its standards and delivers constantly impeccable classroom and learning experiences. I will recommend MIT to any one interested in studying Engineering or any program that involves practical applications.

name: Massachusetts Institute of Technology
text: My time at MIT has taught me resilience. The workload is demanding, but it forces you to manage your time and stay sharp. More importantly, I’ve learned how to adapt, ask better questions, and push through challenges ; skills that go far beyond school.

name: Massachusetts Institute of Technology
text: Being at MIT feels like living inside the future. From labs to startups, everywhere you turn there are projects that could change the world. It’s inspiring to be in an environment where innovation is the standard, not the exception.

name: Massachusetts Institute of Technology
text: Well the program was quiet alright tho ot was a bit difficult at first some of the concepts required a lot of research to actually gain a some understanding, but over time they where manageable I especially liked the practicality of the program, overaly I enjoyed it

name: Massachusetts Institute of Technology
text: MIT is a top college in the USA offering a multitude of technology based courses. The college exposes students to a variety of top companies, research institutes and other influential career prospects. This happens not just after the study period but also during the course of study. As such as soon as students graduate, they are already equipped with industry specific qualifications to compete and thrive on top earning jobs worldwide. One down side to MIT is the immense level of competition and demand academically from the programs, as such some students might spend much of their time studying and not focus on other enjoyable aspects of the university.

name: Massachusetts Institute of Technology
text: MIT is all about constructive chaos. The institute provides the resources and environment you need.
author: Alicia, OH

name: Massachusetts Institute of Technology
text: I have truly found paradise or I hate this fracking place. Both are true all the time.
author: Samantha, Sylmar CA

name: Massachusetts Institute of Technology
text: The material taught in the lecture hall of MIT is difficult. There's no way around it.
author: Peter, Cambridge MA

name: Massachusetts Institute of Technology
text: The pace is really fast, but everyone works hard and with each other on problem sets.
author: Christopher, Elmhurst IL

name: Princeton University
text: Princeton is a place that combines academic excellence with a strong sense of community. The professors are not only brilliant but also approachable, and the small class sizes make learning feel personal. What really stands out is the campus itself ; it’s beautiful, quiet, and creates the perfect environment for focused study. At the same time, there are so many opportunities to get involved in research, clubs, and activities. It’s definitely rigorous, but the support and resources here make the journey worthwhile.

name: Princeton University
text: Pros: – beautiful campus, especially in spring and fall – extremely generous financial aid policy. International students also enjoy need-blind application policy when requesting financial aid. – great undergraduate education. The number of graduate students is very small compared to other top Ivy League schools. The professors devote a lot of attention to undergraduate students. – not too far away from NYC. One only need to hop on a train and can get to NYC in 1.5hrs.

name: Princeton University
text: Princeton University is truly unique in the sense that its student body is not only incredibly intelligent but also extremely generous in sharing their knowledge with others. The university provides numerous research opportunities, creating a fantastic scholarly environment that encourages collaboration and intellectual growth. In essence, Princeton is a wonderful place to study, learn, and thrive.

name: Princeton University
text: Princeton is a stunning campus that provides an inspiring backdrop for its rigorous academic environment. The faculty and students alike contribute to a welcoming atmosphere, making it easy to feel at home. Most importantly, Princeton’s academic strength and challenging curriculum create an intellectually stimulating experience that I truly appreciate. Overall, I’m thrilled to be a part of such a wonderful university.

name: Princeton University
text: Princeton University is an exceptional college that provides its students with opportunities, particularly in the field of research. One of the most striking aspects of Princeton is the unique combination of humility and intellectual prowess among its students. This creates a stimulating and supportive environment for learning, making Princeton an ideal place to grow both academically and personally.

name: Princeton University
text: Princeton is challenging and the content of what we learn is relavent to life.
author: GA

name: Princeton University
text: Princeton has a beautiful campus! The students are friendly and hardworking.
author: Gabriella

name: Princeton University
text: Possibly the most exclusive college in the world, with fantastic academic resources for students' academic endeavors.
author: Tim, Singapore

name: Princeton University
text: Princeton is an extremely welcoming school with excellent professors, students, and faculty members.
author: A Midwestern Boy

name: Princeton University
text: Princeton was my life dream, two months in I have no doubt I made the right choice.
author: 2016 Tiger

name: Princeton University
text: Being at Princeton feels a lot like winning the lottery on a daily basis.
author: Annika, Eugene OR

name: Princeton University
text: You will work harder than you have ever worked before but you will take away one of the best educations America has to offer.
author: Tara, Lebanon NJ

name: Princeton University
text: Because Princeton doesn't have any professional schools, it really is the case that they focus a massive amount of resources on undergraduate education.
author: Carolyn, Portage IN

name: Princeton University
text: Princeton is really the best of many worlds - it's a liberal arts college with the resources of a big research powerhouse.
author: Nick, FL

name: Stanford University
text: I had the best experience at Stanford University. My education was so smooth there. I loved the environment and everything there. The lecturers ,the staff, and everyone at large made my university life good

name: Stanford University
text: Being at Stanford puts you right in the heart of Silicon Valley, and you feel that energy everywhere. You meet people who are working on start-ups, research, and projects that genuinely make an impact. The connections and opportunities here are unmatched ; it’s a place where ideas turn into reality quickly.

name: Stanford University
text: Stanford has been an incredible place for me to grow both academically and personally. The professors are not just experts in their fields but also approachable, which makes learning feel collaborative. The flexibility in choosing classes lets you explore your interests widely, and the research opportunities are endless. It’s demanding, but in the best way.

name: Stanford University
text: I had an incredible time at Stanford For me, the university’s motto ‘The winds of freedom blow’ perfectly captures the essence of my experience. I was constantly inspired by the boundless educational opportunities available, from learning from world-class professors to connecting with approachable professionals and exploring vast research opportunities. I also appreciated the flexibility of the curriculum, which allowed me to be adventurous and try new things at any point during my college journey.

name: Stanford University
text: I’ve had an incredible experience at Stanford, and I firmly believe it’s an exceptional place for individuals from all backgrounds to grow and thrive. What really stands out to me is the unparalleled access to resources, but what’s truly remarkable is the genuine care and investment the community has in ensuring each student’s personal growth and development. I feel incredibly fortunate to be a part of this supportive and inclusive environment

name: Stanford University
text: Stanford is an incredible place. It has the best research opportunities and economics in the world.
author: Josh, San Antonio TX

name: Stanford University
text: It is the most productive, accepting, safe, and fun environment I have ever known.
author: Laura, San Fernando CA

name: Stanford University
text: By far the most diverse, relaxed campus full of happy, friendly students of all ages.
author: Dahlton, Jackson CA

name: Stanford University
text: The college experience is more than just classes. Academics are just one part of Stanford life.
author: Vivian

name: Stanford University
text: Stanford advocates that students obtain knowledge in as many areas as possible.
author: Lloyd, Oxnard CA

name: Stanford University
text: The best thing about Stanford is that you learn so much from your peers.
author: Tonya

name: Stanford University
text: One does not get to be a professor at Stanford without being pretty brilliant.
author: William, Reno NV

name: University of Pennsylvania
text: The University of Pennsylvania is a fantastic place to study, not just because of its academic reputation but also due to its location in a vibrant and well-connected area. Future students will appreciate the balance it offers between a dynamic campus environment and a strong sense of community. The surrounding neighborhood feels safe, even for nights out, which adds peace of mind when it comes to personal safety. Additionally, the university is highly supportive of students with additional needs, offering excellent accessibility services and accommodations.

name: University of Pennsylvania
text: As a graduate student at university of Pennsylvania , I’ve been impressed by the level of research opportunities and the sense of community on campus. The professors are incredibly supportive, and many are leaders in their respective fields, which has opened doors to countless professional development opportunities. The collaborative culture here has been fantastic—I’m constantly surrounded by passionate peers, and we often work together on complex projects. The university’s resources, from advanced labs to extensive libraries, provide the perfect environment for research and academic success. Life in this College is a mix of the quiet charm of a college town with access to top-tier academic resources. The university’s commitment to diversity and inclusion also stands out, creating a welcoming environment for students from all backgrounds. I would highly recommend university of Pennsylvania for anyone looking to engage in cutting-edge research, build lasting professional connections, and experience a well-rounded college life. The alumni network is also a huge advantage post-graduation.

name: University of Pennsylvania
text: The university is rated highly as being part of the Ivy League, however, the environment can be highly competitive and discouraging of collaboration, since the focus is always on OCR (On Campus Recruitment) rather that on academic pursuits.

name: University of Pennsylvania
text: Overall, my experience at the University of Pennsylvania was fantastic. As a student, I found the area to be exceptionally accommodating. It provided a range of amenities such as restaurants, supermarkets, pharmacies, a post office, housing options, parks, easy access to downtown, libraries, and other essential facilities that are vital for student life.

name: University of Pennsylvania
text: The University of Pennsylvania is a fantastic institution with outstanding professors. Amazing school with the best professors I could have ever wished for. The University of Pennsylvania’s biggest asset, in my opinion, are its teachers. To ensure that their pupils perform to the best of their abilities, they go above and above in the classroom.The understudies are likewise friendly and welcoming. Students at Penn enjoy a stimulating academic environment and treat their studies with seriousness. There are lots of options for activities. Walking to the university is an unexpected and beautiful experience. Everything is located at Pennsylvania University. From academia to the general public, there will never be a dull moment.

name: University of Pennsylvania
text: Penn has a lot of opportunities academically and socially which I absolutely love.
author: Sabrina, Chicago IL

name: University of Pennsylvania
text: I rate UPenn at a 10 out of 10, I love my school and everything about it.
author: Ami, Philadelphia PA

name: University of Pennsylvania
text: The University of Pennsylvania is a school of opportunity, and is only as good as you make it.
author: Helen, New York NY

name: University of Pennsylvania
text: The University of Pennsylvania is honestly a wonderful school.
author: Brittany, East Elmhurst NY

name: University of Pennsylvania
text: It definitely lives up to the nickname the social Ivy, but that's not to say the academics are not rigorous.
author: Samantha, Philadelphia PA

name: University of Pennsylvania
text: Penn students are defined by their passion, even if it is undefined upon entering freshman year.
author: Josh, Dayville CT

name: University of Pennsylvania
text: I'm not going to lie. Penn is pretty rigorous and you can't afford to slack off to much.
author: Britney, Lake Worth FL

name: University of Pennsylvania
text: Penn's coursework is challenging, but I feel like you leave class every day exhilarated and excited to go back.
author: Christina, Elgin IL

name: Yale University
text: The univeristy helped me to obtained my masters. The best thing is the students all work together to push each other with a great mental ethos. The tutors do really relate to the students, and treat them as equals, not as a lesser person.

name: Yale University
text: Yale University is a fantastic university. It’s evident that the university values student success because of the instructors’ genuinely inspiring enthusiasm for mentoring and teaching. It must be a fantastic place to learn and develop because of the encouraging community and cooperative environment. The atmosphere at Yale University is similar, with committed faculty and a strong sense of student community. The administration and faculty at the university are incredibly friendly and genuinely want to help their students succeed in their chosen fields. Every student supports one another on their individual journeys and is very focused on their objectives.

name: Yale University
text: As a student at Yale University, right here right now, I can say with confidence that the instructors here are excellent. Every instructor brings a wealth of knowledge and practical experience to the classroom, which makes learning engaging and practical. They are mentors who genuinely care about their students’ success, not just lecturers. To make sure that ideas are fully understood and applied, professors regularly employ multimedia, group projects, and practical exercises. In addition to making lessons more interesting, this approach gets us ready for problems that arise in the real world.

name: Yale University
text: So far, I’m having a great time at Yale. I’m currently living on campus and in my second year. For me, the residential college experience has been very positive. I appreciate the ambiance of the colleges and the delightful cuisine that is provided. Furthermore, a sizable student body is consistently present during late hours, which gives me a sense of security when I’m out and about. Regarding my instructors, they have all been friendly and fair in how they administer tests and assign grades. The people here are generally friendly.

name: Yale University
text: Overall, I’ve had a great time at Yale University. The advantages of being a part of a lively community with a diverse student body and a wealth of extracurricular activities, in my opinion, cannot be overstated. I could always reach professors during office hours, and they genuinely helped students with their academic pursuits. The campus culture is very welcoming, and there are lots of fun events held throughout the week and semester. Additionally, the campus is beautiful and spotless. I have enjoyed my classes, and I have done well by attending lectures and actively participating in the course materials. I value how simple it is to get more help.

name: Yale University
text: Despite being highly selective, Yale nurtures an extremely diverse student body.
